name: Clam Chowder with Pasta
recipeIngredient: Green onion, tops and all, finely chopped (2)
Red chile, small, seeded and finely chopped
Clams, fresh (1 pound), shucked, drained, and chopped
Tomato, imported pear-shaped (1 can, 28 ounces), drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a 4-quart Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
2. Sauté parsley, garlic, green onion, and red chile in the oil until fragrant.
3. Stir in clams. Cover and cook for 5 minutes.
4. Process tomatoes (from the can) in a food processor or blender until finely chopped.
5. Add the processed tomatoes, water, white wine, salt, and black pepper to the pot.
6. Heat the mixture to boiling.
7. Reduce heat and cover; simmer for 40 minutes, stirring occasionally.
8. Stir in the ditalini pasta; cover and cook for an additional 10 minutes or until the pasta is tender.
